82.reason: Missing NULL check for file pointer. If the file does not exist, fopen returns NULL and subsequent fgetc calls will cause a segmentation fault.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Missing NULL check for file pointer. If the file does not exist, fopen returns NULL and subsequent fgetc calls will cause a segmentation fault.
